description: Prune a phylogenetic tree down to a specified set of taxa, preserving branch lengths so retained leaves keep their evolutionary distances.
rules: read-only on input — emits a new tree file, never edits the source
KEEP_TAXA is a comma-separated taxa list OR a path to a newline-delimited taxa file
pruned tree (pruned.nw) + run log (prune.log) written under record_store
usage: Set TREE_FILE (input Newick tree) and KEEP_TAXA (comma list like "A,B,C" or a file path). TREE_FORMAT default 0. Outputs: prune.log (always) and pruned.nw (when ete3 present).
limitation: Requires ete3 to prune; without it the porter records an ete3-missing note in prune.log and exits 0 (no pruned.nw is produced).
